headerTitle: Senior MLOps & Generative AI Engineer  ·  Sentara  ·  Health System AI
intro: Operationalizing generative AI in a high-stakes environment — where model outputs touch patient workflows, compliance requirements are real, and reliability isn't optional — is exactly the engineering problem I find most interesting. I've built and deployed production AI pipelines end to end, and I understand the gap between a working prototype and a system someone can trust.
bullets: Production AI Deployment — Shipped LLM-powered features (Claude API, streaming responses, context management) into live SaaS products with real users — not research environments. Built the observability, retry logic, and fallback handling that separates a demo from a deployable system.

MLOps Foundations — Managed containerized services via Docker and PM2, automated deploy pipelines with environment-specific configs, and maintained service health across dev/staging/prod — the operational discipline MLOps at a health system requires.

Generative AI Integration Breadth — Integrated Claude API, ElevenLabs TTS, GA4 behavioral telemetry, and webhook-driven event pipelines into a single production platform — multi-modal AI, not just text — with the logging and monitoring to keep it stable in production.
matchNotes: Strong GenAI/MLOps engineering fit; health system domain is new but compliance-aware prod AI mindset transfers
